title: Drag with magnetic snap to grid
design_brief: Drag items snap to grid points when released; visual magnetic preview during drag.
mobile_reasoning: Drag computes nearest grid point; preview shown.

title: Sheet with embedded map and bottom CTA
design_brief: Sheet with map preview at top, location details middle, sticky CTA bottom.
mobile_reasoning: Fixed-height map + flex content + pinned CTA.

title: FlashList with virtualized horizontal sub-lists
design_brief: Each row contains its own horizontal scroll list. Reference: App Store category rows.
mobile_reasoning: FlashList parent + FlashList horizontal per row.

title: Form with dynamic field set from server
design_brief: Form fields generated from JSON schema.
mobile_reasoning: Field renderer maps schema type to component.

title: Deep linking with auth fence
design_brief: Deep link to /post/123 should redirect to auth if not logged in, then back to original.
mobile_reasoning: Save intended path in MMKV before redirecting; restore after auth.

title: Microinteraction library: spring presets
design_brief: Shared spring presets used across app.
mobile_reasoning: Constants for damping, stiffness, mass.
solution: // motion-presets.ts\nexport const SPRING = {gentle: {damping: 22, stiffness: 200, mass: 0.8}, snappy: {damping: 14, stiffness: 280, mass: 0.7}, bouncy: {damping: 10, stiffness: 200, mass: 1.2}, rigid: {damping: 26, stiffness: 320, mass: 0.5}} as const;\nexport const TIMING = {fast: {duration: 150}, normal: {duration: 250}, slow: {duration: 400}} as const;

title: Interactive shader (drag finger to shape)
design_brief: Shader where finger position drives shader uniform.
mobile_reasoning: Skia Uniforms with shared value.

title: Smart album auto-grouping (face/place)
design_brief: Photos auto-grouped by faces and places (iOS Photos style).
mobile_reasoning: VisionKit face detection + EXIF location.

title: Map traffic overlay
design_brief: Show traffic conditions on map.
mobile_reasoning: showsTraffic prop.

title: Time-aware chart axis labels
design_brief: Chart x-axis labels adapt to time range (hours/days/months).
mobile_reasoning: Format based on duration.
solution: // TimeAxis.ts\nexport function formatAxis(ts: number, durationMs: number): string { const d = new Date(ts); if (durationMs < 86400000) return d.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit'}); if (durationMs < 2592000000) return d.toLocaleDateString([], {month: 'short', day: 'numeric'}); return d.toLocaleDateString([], {month: 'short', year: 'numeric'}); }

title: Aurora gradient app with brand cohesion
design_brief: App-wide aesthetic with aurora-style gradient + brand colors. Reference: emerging brand identity systems.
mobile_reasoning: Aurora bg from rn-418 + brand palette.

title: App handoff between devices (iOS Continuity)
design_brief: User starts task on iPhone, continues on iPad via Handoff.
mobile_reasoning: NSUserActivity advertising; needs native module.
solution: // useHandoff.ts (concept; requires native bridge)\nimport React from 'react';\nexport function useHandoff(activityType: string, userInfo: any) { /* call native code */ }

title: Keyboard navigation for tablet users
design_brief: All actions reachable via hardware keyboard (tab/arrows/enter).
mobile_reasoning: focusable + accessibilityRole for keyboard nav.

title: Fabric vs Paper architecture awareness
design_brief: Use Fabric (new architecture) for synchronous native calls and shadow tree.
mobile_reasoning: Fabric enables sync layout and JSI.
solution: // app.json\n// {\"expo\": {\"newArchEnabled\": true}}

title: Photo editor with non-destructive layers
design_brief: Editor where each adjustment is a separate layer that can be toggled.
mobile_reasoning: Skia ColorMatrix composed from active layers.

title: Map with 3D animated camera flyover
design_brief: Animate camera flyover to a destination (iOS Maps style).
mobile_reasoning: animateCamera with multiple waypoints.

title: Live updating multi-series line chart
design_brief: Live data feeds multiple lines on chart simultaneously.
mobile_reasoning: Skia paths per series + shared values for live data.

title: Persistent loading state with optimistic UI
design_brief: User taps action → optimistic update shown immediately; if server fails, revert with animation.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Wait for server before UI change
mobile_reasoning: Local state updates first; revert on error.
solution: // useOptimistic.ts (React 18 useOptimistic alternative)\nimport React, {useState, useCallback} from 'react';\nexport function useOptimisticToggle(initial: boolean, mutate: (v: boolean) => Promise<boolean>) { const [value, setValue] = useState(initial); const toggle = useCallback(async () => { const next = !value; setValue(next); try { await mutate(next); } catch { setValue(!next); }}, [value, mutate]); return [value, toggle] as const; }

title: Per-frame physics simulation
design_brief: Bouncing balls with collisions in a canvas.
mobile_reasoning: useFrameCallback runs per frame on UI thread; simple physics.

title: Distinctive splash + branding for a fitness app
design_brief: Complete branding moment: splash with logo bloom + brand color + heartbeat sound on launch. Combines patterns from rn-187, rn-097, and brand identity. The synthesis of everything in this dataset — a launch experience that announces 'this is a real mobile app, made with care.'
mobile_reasoning: Splash held until brand animation completes; logo blooms via Skia path morph; heartbeat ECG line from rn-097 animates briefly; on tap or auto after 1.5s, transitions to home with shared element of logo. The accumulated patterns from this dataset, applied in concert.

stylesheet_strategy.organization: FitnessBrandSplash composes LogoMark, ECGLine, and shared-element transition to home.
stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: None — both platforms get the same brand moment.
stylesheet_strategy.responsive_strategy: Logo size scales with min screen dimension.

animation_strategy: Logo entry: scale 0→1 with bounce spring. ECG line draws once over 1s. Heartbeat sound plays via expo-av. Transition: logo shrinks to header position via shared element.
gesture_strategy: Tap to skip (touch anywhere). Auto-advance after 1.5s.
interaction_details: Logo blooms with spring + success haptic
Heartbeat ECG line animates + audio plays
Shared element: logo can morph into header on next screen
accessibility_considerations: accessibilityLabel='Welcome to FitApp, launching'. accessibilityElementsHidden during animation; tap accessible. Reduce Motion: skip bloom/ECG, instant logo + immediate dismiss after announcement.
performance_notes: Splash held via SplashScreen API. Skia logo + ECG = GPU. Sound preloaded. Single-shot animations.
what_makes_this_native: 1) System SplashScreen control. 2) Combined haptic + audio + visual = multi-sensory mobile experience. 3) Native blur, GPU drawing, system splash — the whole dataset's patterns synthesized into one launch moment that announces 'this is mobile, made with intention.'
